stage10_scale_x30.description: Scale curve point C: high-compute run targeting ~30x training data regime vs stage7 while keeping algorithm unchanged.

stage8_scale_x3.description: Scale curve point A: ~3x per-seed compute vs stage7 while preserving PPO and trace-finetune workflow.

stage9_scale_x10.description: Scale curve point B: around an order-of-magnitude per-seed compute vs stage7 with stronger train/eval sampling.
